text: Key growth drivers include iPhone demand and strategic media investments. Loop Capital analysts reported Apple shipped 45 million iPhones in Q2 2025, matching forecasts, as tariff fears and aggressive promotions helped offset an otherwise flat global smartphone market []. Apple is pursuing expansion in sports media, placing a $150 million bid for Formula 1 media rights as part of broader sports business transformation efforts []. However, financial performance shows pressure, with Q3 2025 revenue declining 1.39% year-over-year and net income down 5.43% year-over-year [,]. The company maintains strong cash generation with a free cash flow margin of 25.95% in Q3, supporting continued investment in growth initiatives [].
